title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXIV. Natural History.
content:
There was a little boy went into a barn,
            And lay down on some hay;
        An owl came out and flew about,
            And the little boy ran away.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DLXIV. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
